mechanism_narrative: The federal funds rate at 0.09% is near zero, indicating an accommodative monetary stance. A sustained period without rate increases signals continued monetary ease, which depresses long-term Treasury yields through expectations of low real rates and reduced inflation risk premium. The 10-year yield falls as investors price in extended accommodation.
regime_hint: monetary accommodation at zero lower bound
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises by more than 10 basis points over 20 trading days despite FEDFUNDS remaining below 0.15%, or Rank IC < 0.05 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate at 7.4% signals labor market slack. When UNRATE exceeds 7.0%, it indicates persistent economic weakness that reduces inflation expectations and growth forecasts, causing the 10-year Treasury yield to decline as investors shift to safe-haven positioning and lower terminal rate expectations.
regime_hint: labor market slack and economic weakness
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield increases by more than 15 basis points over 20 trading days when UNRATE > 7.0%, or positive correlation between UNRATE and 10Y yield exceeds 0.3 over any 12-month period.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales (RSAFS) at 424,481 million dollars combined with housing starts (HOUST) at 836 thousand units indicate moderate consumer demand. When both series decline month-over-month by more than 2%, it signals demand destruction that reduces inflation pressures and growth expectations, causing 10-year Treasury yields to fall as terminal rate expectations compress.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS declines > 2% MoM AND HOUST declines > 2% MoM
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises by more than 20 basis points over 20 trading days when both RSAFS and HOUST decline > 2% MoM, or joint signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) at 98.9462 (below 2017=100 baseline) reflects supply-side weakness. Sustained INDPRO below 99.0 combined with rising CPIAUCSL signals stagflationary pressures. In this regime, 10-year Treasury yields rise as investors demand higher real yields to compensate for persistent inflation and weak growth.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls by more than 25 basis points over 60 trading days when INDPRO < 99.0 and CPIAUCSL > 233.0, or interaction signal produces negative correlation with yield changes exceeding -0.25.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll employment (PAYEMS) at 136,038 thousand persons reflects labor market conditions. A month-over-month decline in PAYEMS exceeding 100 thousand signals labor market deterioration that reduces aggregate demand expectations and inflation forecasts, causing 10-year Treasury yields to decline as growth and inflation risk premiums compress.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises by more than 8 basis points over 5 trading days following a PAYEMS decline > 100 thousand, or signal produces Rank IC < 0.06 over any 12-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP (GDPC1) at 15,648.7 billion chained 2017 dollars combined with retail sales momentum indicates aggregate demand strength. When GDPC1 growth accelerates above 2.5% annualized and RSAFS shows month-over-month growth > 1%, it signals robust demand that increases inflation expectations and terminal rate forecasts, causing 10-year Treasury yields to rise.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 growth > 2.5% annualized AND RSAFS growth > 1% MoM
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls by more than 30 basis points over 60 trading days when GDPC1 growth > 2.5% and RSAFS growth > 1% MoM, or joint signal produces Rank IC < 0.05 over any 18-month rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: CPI (CPIAUCSL) at 233.318 combined with near-zero FEDFUNDS indicates real rates are deeply negative. When CPIAUCSL rises month-over-month by more than 0.5% while FEDFUNDS remains below 0.5%, it signals inflation acceleration without monetary tightening, forcing 10-year Treasury yields to rise as investors demand higher nominal yields to protect real purchasing power.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield falls by more than 15 basis points over 20 trading days when CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% MoM and FEDFUNDS < 0.5%, or interaction signal produces negative correlation with yield changes exceeding -0.20.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) at 836 thousand units represent housing market activity. A sustained decline in HOUST below 800 thousand units signals housing demand weakness that reduces construction employment, consumer wealth effects, and future consumption expectations, causing 10-year Treasury yields to fall as growth forecasts compress and investors seek safe-haven positioning.
failure_condition: 10-year Treasury yield rises by more than 35 basis points over 60 trading days when HOUST < 800 thousand for 2 consecutive months, or signal produces Rank IC < 0.04 over any 24-month rolling window.
